papers.title: An Overview of Learning-Based Dexterous Grasping

papers.title: Towards Robotic Dexterous Hand Intelligence: A Survey

papers.output: 重点看动作空间、触觉和闭环控制章节
papers.localPath: /data2/zmy/papers/综述/Towards Robotic Dexterous Hand Intelligence A Survey.pdf

papers.title: The Developments and Challenges towards Dexterous and Embodied Robotic Manipulation: A Survey

papers.output: 只精读挑战、数据和评测部分
papers.localPath: /data2/zmy/papers/综述/Towards Robotic Dexterous Hand Intelligence A Survey.pdf

papers.title: A Mathematical Introduction to Robotic Manipulation
papers.goal: 补齐SE(3)、twist、wrench、运动学与控制基础
papers.output: 按章节穿插，不要求一次读完
papers.localPath: /data2/zmy/papers/综述/The Developments and Challenges towards Dexterous and Embodied Robotic Manipulation A Survey.pdf

papers.title: Eigengrasp
papers.goal: 理解低维手型协同和动作降维
papers.output: 推导PCA/eigengrasp表示并联系DextrAH动作空间

papers.title: DexGraspNet
papers.goal: 理解大规模灵巧抓取数据的表示与生成
papers.output: 记录数据格式、物体来源、抓取质量评估

papers.title: UniDexGrasp
papers.goal: 理解通用抓取生成与策略执行的经典路线
papers.output: 画出两阶段pipeline并记录观测/动作/reward

papers.title: DexGraspAnything: Towards Universal Robotic Dexterous Grasping
papers.goal: 理解扩散式抓取生成与物理约束采样

papers.title: D(R,O)Grasp
papers.goal: 理解跨手形态的手—物关系表示
papers.output: 明确表示是否能作为你的functional prior

papers.title: DextER
papers.goal: 补充抓取生成/重定向路线
papers.output: 关注输入输出、是否依赖目标pose

papers.title: Multi-Keypoint Affordance Representation for Functional Dexterous Grasping
papers.goal: 理解功能关键点作为中间表示
papers.output: 比较keypoint、mask和hand-object relation三种prompt

papers.title: Web2Grasp
papers.goal: 理解网页HOI到机器人功能抓取数据链路
papers.output: 拆解数据获取、重建、重定向、物理筛选

papers.title: Grasp as You Say
papers.goal: 理解语言条件抓取生成
papers.output: 记录语言如何进入几何/姿态生成

papers.title: Dexterous Functional Grasping
papers.goal: 理解功能区域感知与eigengrasp闭环执行
papers.output: 重点记录上游功能区域与下游RL的接口

papers.title: FunGrasp
papers.goal: 理解人类功能抓取先验到动态执行
papers.output: 比较目标pose先验与你的关系先验

papers.title: Universal Dexterous Functional Grasping via Demonstration-Editing Reinforcement Learning
papers.goal: 理解示范编辑和功能抓取泛化

papers.title: Dexterous Pre-grasp Manipulation for Human-like Functional Categorical Grasping
papers.goal: 理解给定功能目标后的预抓取操作
papers.output: 区分目标生成、预抓取调整和最终执行

overview.mainLine: 功能先验 -> 抓取生成 -> 闭环执行 -> VLA/触觉扩展

phases.coreQuestion: 领域有哪些问题、方法和数学基础？
phases.checkpoint: 能说清生成与执行的区别

phases.coreQuestion: 抓取pose/关系/功能先验如何产生？
策略如何把先验变成可执行动作？

phases.checkpoint: 明确暂缓与立即实现部分

phases.coreQuestion: 无触觉或弱触觉如何形成闭环？
